scripts.deploy:web: vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.db:migrate:remote:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply easy-driving-booking --remote --env production
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --local --file=./seed/01-centers.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --local --file=./seed/02-services.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --local --file=./seed/03-forms.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --local --file=./seed/04-resources.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --local --file=./seed/05-packages.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --file=./seed/01-centers.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --file=./seed/02-services.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --file=./seed/03-forms.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --file=./seed/04-resources.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --file=./seed/05-packages.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote:prod: wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --env production --file=./seed/01-centers.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --env production --file=./seed/02-services.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --env production --file=./seed/03-forms.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --env production --file=./seed/04-resources.sql && wrangler d1 execute easy-driving-booking --remote --env production --file=./seed/05-packages.sql
